title: Midnight Butter Canadian Crust
description: A light and buttery midnight craving featuring a gluten-free shortcrust pastry with hints of darkness.

ingredients.name: Almond Flour
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free almond flour for a smooth texture.

ingredients.name: Arrowroot Powder
ingredients.notes: Stabilizes the dough and helps achieve a crispy crust.

ingredients.name: Coconut Oil
ingredients.notes: Partial substitution can be with vegan butter for dairy-free option.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Adjust amount as needed to reach desired consistency.

ingredients.name: Baking Soda
ingredients.notes: Neutralizes acidity from almond flour and arrowroot.

ingredients.name: Vanilla Extract
ingredients.notes: Enhances the flavor of the crust.

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine almond flour and arrowroot powder.
Add coconut oil, water, dark chocolate chips if using, and vanilla extract. Mix until dough forms but don't overwork it to maintain texture.
Divide the dough into 4 portions. Place each portion on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Press each portion lightly with your fingers or a rolling pin into a circle about 1/8 inch thick and 3 inches in diameter.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, until golden brown. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
Enjoy as is or serve with whipped cream or ganache.
